name: distributed-queue-load-balancer
description: Distributed job queue system with Nginx load balancing and Redis-backed workers

scripts.start:all: concurrently "npm run start:3001" "npm run start:3002" "npm run start:3003"
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run start:3001" "npm run start:3002" "npm run start:3003" "npm run dev:worker"
